_comment: Reference/model template library — fully populated with real pro swings. Templates store only DERIVED normalized pose (no video). Built via refkit (uv/yt-dlp) -> detectswings/splitswings -> poseextract -> analyze -> buildref.

wedge_face_on.source: Rory McIlroy iron (proxy for wedge), face-on
wedge_face_on.note: swap for a real pro WEDGE face-on when available

wedge_dtl.source: Justin Thomas iron (proxy for wedge), DTL
wedge_dtl.note: swap for a real pro WEDGE DTL when available

notes: 6 slots use an exact-club pro swing; the 2 wedge slots use a pro IRON as a proxy (wedge body mechanics ~ iron). Full-res clips downloaded with yt-dlp (personal use); only normalized templates are committed, never the video (reference/_src/ is git-ignored). Auto-segmented via detectswings/splitswings — a couple of clips came from compilation videos, so event detection on the reference itself may be imperfect; re-run add_ref on a cleaner single-swing clip to improve any slot.
